title: Department Manager Vacancy at Cafe Coffee Day - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Cafe Coffee Day - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cafe Coffee Day is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cafe Coffee Day:
Cafe Coffee Day is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cafe Coffee Day!
